repo.name: EBTA - David Aronson
repo.git_status_policy: Run git status live before relying on repo dirtiness; do not persist porcelain snapshots here.
repo.warning: git status may emit permission warnings for C:/Users/liant/.config/git/ignore

startup_read_order: .ai/governance/AI_MODIFICATION_CHECKLIST.md when the task is normative, structural, or implementation-impacting

active_paths.active_protocol_entrypoint: Protocole/0-README - Comprendre et maintenir le protocole EBTA.md

authority_model.runtime_authority: Implementation/ is executable derivative, not normative doctrine
authority_model.runtime_machine_state: See active_paths.active_tracking_path — single source of truth for runtime step/task state
authority_model.ai_cockpit: .ai/ is the single AI project-state cockpit; .ai/governance/ is procedural modification governance, not scientific authority
authority_model.tooling_support: .agents/ is historical/tooling support only, not a project-state authority
authority_model.adapter_boundary: BACKTRADER remains reference-only; NautilusTrader is confined to the EBTA adapter boundary as simulator/execution layer

workstreams.title: Moteur de backtest natif EBTA
workstreams.routing_reason: /start requested on 2026-07-02; replaces the external-engine BACKTRADER integration track with a native EBTA engine track. User later answered 1A/2B/3A: BACKTRADER read-only, data root supplied, and Implementation/ work authorized through Phase 8. Phases -1 through 8 were executed on 2026-07-02.
workstreams.closure_reason: Cloture mecanique alignee sur l'etat deja narre dans checkpoint.json (DONE/DONE) ; reste DONE historiquement par decision D2 du pivot Nautilus, non touche par le remplacement du moteur.
non_goals: No Protocole/ modification
No BACKTRADER runtime dependency
No native engine extension before package validation remains PASS
No web application in this Phase -1 through Phase 8 execution
No OOS opening before sealing

workstreams.title: Integration BACKTRADER apres gouvernance locale
workstreams.routing_reason: Superseded by PLAN_IMPLEMENTATION_MOTEUR_BACKTEST_EBTA_NATIF; BACKTRADER is now reference-only for native EBTA rewrite.
workstreams.closure_reason: Cloture mecanique alignee sur l'etat deja narre dans checkpoint.json (DONE/SUPERSEDED) ; remplace par le plan natif puis par le pivot Nautilus.
non_goals: No BACKTRADER modification before governance read
No EBTA runtime contract change before mapping gaps are known
No import of BACKTRADER conventions as EBTA norms

workstreams.title: Proposition Architecture IA / RAG evolutive EBTA

No mass metadata migration

workstreams.title: Couche de gouvernance IA pour transformation controlee des connaissances

No Implementation/ modification
No RAG, embeddings, vector database, or autonomous agent system

workstreams.title: Gouvernance des biais humains dans EBTA
workstreams.routing_reason: Option A GO received on 2026-07-01; normative Protocole documentation completed as EBTA-DOC-1.1; runtime G-BIAS checkers, OOS guard, aggregate gate, package validation compatibility, pilot evidence, and regression tests completed.

workstreams.title: Extension multi-fold du moteur de backtest natif EBTA
workstreams.routing_reason: Correction 2026-07-07: cette entree affirmait a tort un routage /start effectue le 2026-07-06 (lifecycle TRIAGED, source_path vers .ai/backlog/mainline/). Le fichier n'a en realite jamais quitte '0 - HUMAN START HERE/' et n'a jamais ete reecrit selon le gabarit. Le document lui-meme (bandeau d'audit du 2026-07-06) declare qu'il ne peut pas etre route via /start sans decision humaine explicite levant le verrou de gouvernance (extension au-dela du MVP NATIVE_ENGINE_PHASE_8_COMPLETED deja DONE). Cette entree reste INTAKE/BLOCKED tant que cette decision n'est pas donnee.
workstreams.closure_reason: Remplace definitivement par 0 - HUMAN START HERE/Implementation_plan_Nautilus.md (bandeau de tete section 0.1) ; implementation_plan - 1.md archive tel quel pour tracabilite.

Completed Nautilus Phase 4 cost and strategy bridge; explicit venue models and one GenericPayloadStrategy class pass; Phase 5 extraction/multifold is active

Nautilus Phase 6 package gate passed; full Nautilus-backed research_package builds PASS under the dedicated venv; pre-cutover tag is next

risks.risk: Relay files could become a competing EBTA source of truth
risks.control: Relay files point to Protocole/ and Implementation/ authorities and only track handoff state

risks.risk: BACKTRADER reference mining could import external conventions into EBTA
risks.control: BACKTRADER governance was read first; BACKTRADER stayed read-only/reference-only; data provenance and native rewrite boundaries are documented; runtime tests and package validation passed

risks.risk: Checkpoint could become stale or narrative again
risks.control: .ai/checkpoint.schema.json v1.2.0 constrains structure; runtime state delegated entirely to tracking.json

risks.risk: Runtime tracking JSON could drift without machine validation
risks.control: Implementation/Active/tracking.schema.json v1.1.0 constrains the active tracking file

risks.risk: Human intake drafts could be executed without audit
risks.control: 0 - HUMAN START HERE/ is intake-only; .ai/tools/plan.ps1 start requires -Audited and backlog-ready sections before routing

risks.risk: .ai workstreams could duplicate Implementation/Active runtime tracking
risks.control: .ai/checkpoint.json tracks macro workstreams only; runtime step/task state is exclusively in tracking.json

risks.risk: .ai/governance/ could be mistaken for EBTA scientific authority
risks.control: Governance files state that Protocole/ remains normative and Implementation/ remains the executable derivative

risks.risk: The G-BIAS runtime layer could become a competing taxonomy
risks.control: bias_registry.py, schemas, checkers, guard, and bias_gate.py cite SOP 13 and BIAS_RISK_REGISTER.md and are tracked as subordinate runtime contracts
